analysis.summary: The recording shows a remote support session with a black screen for its entire 1 minute and 5 second duration. Only a mouse cursor is visible, moving sporadically. No applications were opened or actions performed.
issues_observed: Black screen with only a mouse cursor visible for the entire duration of the recording.
notable_events: The screen remained black for the entire duration of the recording, showing only a mouse cursor, indicating a display issue or an unresponsive remote system.
concerns: The technician may have connected to a machine that was powered off, in a sleep state, or experiencing a display issue, resulting in a black screen for the entire session. No actual work could be performed or monitored, raising concerns about unproductive session time.

stuck_details: The technician was likely stuck on a black screen, unable to see or interact with the remote desktop environment. Mouse movements were continuous but did not result in any change on screen, indicating a display issue on the remote end or an unresponsive system. This lasted for the entire 1 minute 5 seconds duration of the recording.
tech_performance.efficiency_notes: The technician appeared to be connected to a black screen, attempting to interact with the system via mouse movements without any visual feedback. This suggests a significant impediment to performing any work and no observable progress.
coaching_flags: Investigate why the remote session displayed a black screen for the entire duration. Possible causes include a powered-off machine, a machine in a sleep state, or a display driver issue on the client side. The technician should have potentially tried a different connection method, a restart command, or contacted the client to verify machine status if the black screen persisted, rather than merely moving the mouse for the entire session.
